item.title: Download Q-Dir 12.55
item.description: Q-Dir is software to manage the entire file and folder on the computer, allowing to see file in same time 4 different positions (viewport quadro) while still maintaining all the standard features of the Explorer. item.title: Download CrystalMark Retro 2.1.0
item.description: CrystalMark Retro allows you to evaluate hard drive performance thoroughly. With CrystalMark Retro, you can measure both sequential and random read/write speeds of your hard drive. Sequential read/write speed refers to the speed of accessing data in a linear or sequential manner, while random read/write speed refers to the speed of accessing data in a non-sequential or random manner . By measuring these speeds, you can better understand your hard drive's overall performance and identify...
